# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'URL of the artifact to download')
        string(name: 'TARGET_SERVER', defaultValue: '', description: 'Target server for deployment')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "wget ${params.ARTIFACT_URL} -O build-artifact.tar.gz"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh "scp build-artifact.tar.gz user@${params.TARGET_SERVER}:/path/to/deploy"
                    sh "ssh user@${params.TARGET_SERVER} 'cd /path/to/deploy && tar -xzf build-artifact.tar.gz && rm build-artifact.tar.gz'"
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs()
        }
    }
}
